properties.note: Lightweight map substrate for visual context: major roads, rail, water bodies, and waterways in a Bengaluru-area bounding box.
properties.display_filter: Filtered for animated SVG rendering: road-major length >= 0.002 degrees, named road-minor length >= 0.015, rail length >= 0.004, waterway length >= 0.0015, water polygon area >= 0.000002 square degrees.
